name: Honey Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
If using sweetened cereal, only use half the amount of honey.
Preheat oven to 400°F. Stir together flour and baking powder. In a large mixing bowl, beat together milk, honey, egg, and oil until thoroughly mixed. Add flour mixture, cereal, and raisins, stirring only until combined. Portion batter evenly into greased muffin cups. Bake for about 25 minutes, or until lightly browned. Serve warm.
Per muffin: 210 calories, 2 g dietary fiber, 4 g fat
Sylvia's comments: I found these a bit dry, but the kids and Peter have scarfed them down happily. What do I know?
